title: Baton Slice Spec
description: The machine-readable contract for one slice: scope, the needs it covers, and its acceptance criteria as EARS-notation entries with trace links. Human-authored rationale lives in the free-text 'rationale' field; runtime state lives in status.json (slice-status-v1).

id_token.description: A clean identifier token. Disallows whitespace and ':' so a newline-fusion defect fails validation by construction.

ears_pattern.description: EARS pattern class. 'none' (free-form, unmatched) is deliberately excluded — it is a Rule 8 violation the lint catches, never a valid authored value.

scope.description: One sentence: what this slice delivers.

rationale.description: Human-authored prose explaining the slice. Optional; never machine-parsed.

touchpoints.description: Files/paths this slice owns. Used by track-disjointness and design-fit checks.

covers_needs.description: Intake need ids this slice delivers (vertical trace up). Rule 8 requires every slice to thread to at least one need.

text.description: The acceptance criterion in EARS notation.

test_refs.description: Forward trace: test names/paths that verify this AC. Filled as tests land.
